text.name: Are you sure you want to skip the tutorial?
You need wood piles to repair this boat.
You need a duct tape to repair this boat.
You can repair this wooden boat with the woodpiles you have.
You can patch this inflatable boat with the duct tape you have.
The boat is repaired, are you ready to move to the next island? You won't be able to come back again!
Supplies will be dropped after the video ad.
“Hello, do you want to exchange some items? This is what I offer:”
The box may contain anything, from food to guns.
Billy "Red" Unlock Requirement: Kill 5 zombies with any shotgun. Difficulty Requirement: -
Emilio "Doc" Unlock Requirement: Stop bleeding 6 times. Difficulty Requirement: -
Dave "Boxer" Unlock Requirement: Kill 10 zombies with bare hands. Difficulty Requirement: -
Lee "Maniac" Unlock Requirement: Kill a hostile survivor with any axe. Difficulty Requirement: "Regular" or higher
Sergey "Slav" Unlock Requirement: Kill 3 other survivors in a single run. Difficulty Requirement: "Regular" or higher
John "Biker" Unlock Requirement: Carry a rider set (moto helmet, jacket, pipe wrench) in a single run. Difficulty Requirement: "Regular" or higher
Ganzo "Dragon" Unlock Requirement: Kill 4 hostile survivors armed with a firearm. Difficulty Requirement: "Veteran" or higher
Tom "Survivor" Unlock Requirement: Survive for 7 days. Difficulty Requirement: "Veteran" or higher
Garry "Veteran" Unlock Requirement: Carry a gorka set (gorka helmet, gorka jacket, gorka pants) in a single run. Difficulty Requirement: "Veteran" or higher
Survivor 1 Starting Gear: jeans, t-shirt Unlocked Perks: None
Survivor 2 Starting Gear: jeans, t-shirt Unlocked Perks: None
Survivor 3 Starting Gear: jeans, t-shirt Unlocked Perks: None
Billy "Red" Starting Gear: bandana, t-shirt, jeans Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Sharpshooter
Emilio "Doc" Starting Gear: t-shirt, paramedic pants, bandage x1 Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Red+
Dave "Boxer" Starting Gear: t-shirt, jeans, rags x1 Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Blocker
Lee "Maniac" Starting Gear: gas mask, dress, jeans, butcher knife Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Sweet home
John "Biker" Starting Gear: moto helmet, jacket, jeans, pipe wrench Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Sprinter
Sergey "Slav" Starting Gear: balaclava, tracksuit jacket, tracksuit pants, baseball bat Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Puncher
Ganzo "Dragon" Starting Gear: hunter pants, improvised bow, crafted arrow x1, composite bolt x5 Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Sprinter, Lvl.1 Snowborn
Tom "Survivor" Starting Gear: cowboy hat, t-shirt, jeans, improvised sling bag, hunting knife Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Survivalist, Lvl.1 Hunter
Garry "Veteran" Starting Gear: cap, bulletproof vest, t-shirt, jeans, colt 1911, .45 ACP ammo x14 Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Sharpshooter, Lvl.1 Scout
No connection to the airdrop center! please restore your internet connection.
Use 1/2/3 blood bags or saline bags
Kill 5/15/30 infected with an assault rifle or an SMG
Kill 5/15/30 infected with a bow or a crossbow
Kill 5/15/30 infected with a semi-auto or a bolt action rifle
Visit at least one city on 1/2/3 islands
Find the medieval castle; A testament to a glorious era
Enter the bunker; A military fortress that failed to stop the virus
Equip a complete protective suit with gas mask
Kill every type of infected on Legendary difficulty

You can fight in melee with bare hands or with melee weapons. Melee fight proceeds automatically when you are close to an enemy. Each weapon has a different chance to cause triple damage or a chance to block an enemy attack.
With ranged weapons, aiming takes place automatically. Shoot by using the button. Shooting while running is less accurate than while standing.
The fireplace provides heat, light and a cooking possibility. It can be used up to three times once built.
You can grow plants which will provide you with food. You need seeds and a shovel, pitchfork or pickaxe to plant.
You’ll need resources for crafting. You can find or gather them.
When you’re injured, you can start bleeding. You can’t regenerate while bleeding and you constantly lose blood. Use bandages or rags to stop the bleeding.

You can catch a disease if your temperature drops to 0% or, in rare cases, if you’re attacked by infected. You can’t regenerate while diseased. To cure the disease, use tetracycline or maintain your temperature, food and water statuses over 75%.
Cold weather can bring your temperature down. During the night, rain or snow, the temperature decreases even more.
You need to eat and drink to survive. Check the status bars for your hunger and thirst. If they drop under 50%, you can't regenerate your blood status bar.
If blood drops to zero, you die. You can lose blood from being attacked in melee or from being hit by bullets. You'll also start losing blood if your heat/water/food drops to zero.
You can stop bleeding with bandages or rags (some clothes can be torn into rags).
Use blood bags and saline bags to restore blood.
If your water, food and heat are all over 50%, you will start regenerating blood.
Hide inside buildings to warm up.
Find warm clothing in a good condition to warm up.
Start a campfire to warm up.
Find a tent and deploy it to hide inside from the rain and to warm up a little.
Most of the loot can be found in buildings.
Loot can also be found in car trunks.
You can find edible berries on some bushes.
You can chop down trees with an axe. Different types of trees provide different resources. All other useful items can be found in the world.
Find a headlamp or night vision goggles to illuminate the night (requires batteries).
Flares can illuminate a small area for a brief period after they’re thrown.
The fireplace can also illuminate an area for a longer period during the night.
Water pumps may contain water for drinking. You can drink from them, but keep in mind water is limited.
You can also fill bottles and canteens from water pumps.
Duct tape adds 15% condition to some gear.
Sewing kit adds 50% condition to some gear.
Cleaning kit adds 25% condition to your firearm.
You can find deer near water or in forests. They’re wary so you need a ranged weapon to hunt them.
If you shoot a deer you can flay it with a knife to get meat steaks.
Meat steaks can be cooked with a fireplace.
Rope + Burlap sack = improvised bag (3 slots)
Improvised bag + 3 wooden sticks = improvised backpack (5 slots)
Wood piles + rags/wooden sticks/papers = fireplace kit
Place a fireplace kit on the ground and light it with matches.
Map will be available after the tutorial.

Boat can be used to move to the current island to a next one. It has to be repaired first (wooden piles or duct tape). There are multiple islands to visit, but beware! Once you get to another island you can't return to the previous one.
Civilian tents can be deployed and used to warm up and store items. Items are stored there permanently.
Wooden barricade (Woodpiles + Sticks x5) and barbed wires can slowdown enemies in case of attack.
Sharpshooter lvl 1: Increased chance to make a headshot with ranged weapon by 10%. lvl 2: Increased headshot damage by 30%.
Scout lvl 1: You can spot other survivors from a greater distance. lvl 2: You can detect the hostility of other survivors.
Sprinter lvl 1: Movement speed increased on 5% lvl 2: Movement speed increased on 10%
Camel lvl 1: Thirst rate decreases by 10%. lvl 2: All canned drinks gives additionaly +10 Water.
Hamster lvl 1: Hunger rate decreases by 10%. lvl 2: All canned goods gives additionaly +10 Food.
Snowborn lvl 1: Raining and snowing drains heat 50% slower. lvl 2: You get +2 heat constantly.
Bullet Farmer lvl 1: All found weapons will contain at least one bullet. lvl 2: All ammo stacks you find will contain 10 more bullets.
Survivalist lvl 1: Regeneration speed doubles if your health drops under 50%. lvl 2: You get +10% movement speed if your health drops under 20%.
Blocker lvl 1: Increased chance to block enemy attacks in melee fight by 5%. lvl 2: Increased chance to block enemy attacks in melee fight by 10%.
Puncher lvl 1: Increased chance to deal critical hits in melee fight by 10%. lvl 2: Increased critical hit damage in melee fight by 30%.
Trunk Digger lvl 1: +20% chance to find loot in car trunks. lvl 2: Adds 10% chance to find 2 items in car trunks.
Hunter lvl 1: Animals have a smaller chance to spot you. lvl 2: You get 50% chance to get additional meat when skinning animals.
Sweet home lvl 1: Staying inside buildings adds 50% more heat. lvl 2: When sleeping your hunger and thirst are reduced by 30%.
Red+ lvl 1: Lowers the blood loss when bleeding by 50%. lvl 2: Bleeding stops 2 times faster.
Vigilance Lv 1: You can spot hidden enemies more easily. Lv 2: You see a little better in the night.
Agronomist lvl 1: You get 50% chance to get more berries when gathering wild berries. lvl 2: You get 50% chance to get more harvest from your plants.
Repair this boat with woodpiles to move further. Chop any tree with an axe to get woodpiles.
Hey! This looks like some loot! Move closer to pick it up.
Here you can check all your items you picked up.
This is your hands slot, it is always available, even if you have no other gear. Use items by tapping.
Welcome, survivor. You are trapped on a small island, and your only chance to get to another one is to find a boat.
Choose the movement controls mode. You can switch between them anytime.
As long as you keep surviving and killing enemies, you will obtain experience points (XP) to unlock perks.
Choose one perk and tap on the plus button. It will always be active until your character dies.
Use the interact button to pick up items and interact.
Now you have a ranged weapon, aiming happens automatically. Use this button to shoot.
You can reload your weapon by tapping this button. If you have suitable ammo, it will be loaded.
Switch between melee and ranged weapons mode.
It looks like you’re bleeding. Find a bandage or tear your t-shirt into rags.
Your blood level dropped to zero. Lucky for you it is only a tutorial and you will be healed now. Go on.
Use drag and drop to manage items in the inventory.
Look, that’s a firearm. It can usually be found on military locations.
Infected ahead! Attack it by moving closer. The fight will proceed automatically.
Wolves! Keep quiet, wolves are pretty dangerous, especially in packs.
A water pump. You can drink from it and fill up your canteen or water bottle.
An abandoned car. You can check the trunk for loot. Move closer to the back of the car to do so.
You can hunt deer and flay them with a knife to get meat.
You can hunt rabbits and flay them with a knife to get meat.
You can gather berries from some bushes, just look around.
You can fuel this boat with the gas canister you have.
You need a full gas canister to fuel this boat.
Enter this bunker? You will be able to get back.
Leave this bunker? You will be able to get back later.
Watch the ad to wake up.
You are about to die. Your only chance to continue playing is using this adrenaline injection after watching the video ad.
You need internet connection to proceed.
Optic scopes- reduces spread, and increases headshot chance
Suppressor- hides muzzle flash and dampens firing noise.
Kate "Tourist" Starting Gear: headlamp, raincoat, jeans, camping backpack, battery Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Vigilance, Lvl.1 Hunter
Jasmine "Lumber" Starting Gear: beret, t-shirt, hunter pants, hatchet, duct tape Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Camel, Lvl.1 Hamster, Lvl.1 Snowborn
Aika "Stringer" Starting Gear: cap, press vest, t-shirt, jeans, canteen, radio Unlocked Perks: Lvl.1 Sprinter, Lvl.1 Scout
Kate "Tourist" Unlock Requirement: Find two different drivable vehicles on the 4th island or later. Difficulty Requirement: "Veteran" or higher difficulty.
Jasmine "Lumber" Unlock Requirement: Drop your karma to -100 and then rise it to +100 in a single run. Difficulty Requirement: "Veteran" or higher difficulty.
Aika "Stringer" Unlock Requirement: Complete 3 tasks from survivors in a single run. Difficulty Requirement: "Veteran" or higher difficulty.
Hello there! Our group is looking for
As a reward you will get
Thanks a lot! Your reward has been marked on the map.
No active task at this moment.
Coordinates where a drivable vehicle is located.
Coordinates of an underground bunker entrance.
A group of survivors is looking for this item:
Hey, we need help! A group of bandits set up a camp not far from here. Eliminate them and we will reward you.
Did you find what we are looking for?
Coordinates of a boat we saw on the east coast.
Hey! We got ambushed and lost our loot case. If you can bring it back to us, we will reward you.
Take care of the bandits first, come back then.
Did you find our loot case?
Thanks a lot! Your reward has been marked on the map.
A group of survivors has lost their loot case. I can find it and bring it back, or I can open it and steal all the stuff.
A group of survivors asked me to deal with bandits.
Bandits eliminated. I need to get back to the survivors for my reward.
MAC-10 Unlock Requirement: Kill 200 infected in total with any pistols. Difficulty Requirement: "Regular" or higher difficulty. Current Progress:
Saiga-12K Unlock Requirement: Kill 150 infected in total with any shotguns. Difficulty Requirement: "Regular" or higher difficulty. Current Progress:
AUG A1 Unlock Requirement: Kill 200 infected in total with any full-auto weapon or SMG. Difficulty Requirement: "Regular" or higher difficulty. Current Progress:
MAC-10 Unlocked Spawn Locations: Gun shops, NATO vehicle crash sites, Underground bunkers
Saiga-12K Unlocked Spawn Locations: Gun shops, EAST Military bases, Underground bunkers
AUG A1 Unlocked Spawn Locations: NATO vehicle crash sites, NATO Military bases, Underground bunkers
AS-VAL Unlock Requirement: Find 6 military crash sites in one run. Difficulty Requirement: "Legendary" or higher difficulty Current Progress:
AS-VAL Unlocked Spawn locations: Underground bunkers
SV-98 Unlock Requirement: Make 200 headshot kills to infecteds with rifles. (Mosin Nagant, SKS ,SVD, Repeater). Difficulty Requirement: "Veteran" or higher difficulty. Current Progress:
SV-98 Unlocked Spawn Locations: Underground bunkers
Milkor MGL Unlock Requirement: Kill "The Tank" 3 times with explosives. Difficulty Requirement: "Legendary" or higher difficulty Current Progress:
Milkor MGL Unlocked Spawn locations: Radiation zone bunkers
Push this button when you're ready for the next wave.
The area is clear, supply crate will drop soon.
• New festive infected appear during snow • New cosmetic item- Santa Hat • New item- Christmas Mystery Box
• Includes a set of expansion features
Feature - Equivalent Exchange Allows converting certain item types to its equivalent
Feature- Item Carryover +6 extra capacity Allows items inside to be carried to the next game Saved:
Feature- Building Mode Allows unconditional storage of all placeable structures
Feature- Experience Shop Allows exchanging experience for supplies
• Weapons, gear, and vehicles do not lose durability
• +50% max health • +100% max hunger and thirst
• Respawn on the west coast after death
• Creatures health bar is hidden • Significantly increased infected count
• Normal infected have higher chance to become specials • From island 3, infected health and damage scales +50% • From island 5, infected health and damage scales +100% (cumulative)
• Not sleeping at night causes fatigue • Blood moon occurs every 7 days • All infected can sense you during blood moon
• NPCs with automatic weapons spray fire continuously
Achievements cannot be unlocked in casual modes

To unlock achievements, you must play a whole session until your character dies. There are 3 tiers: bronze for Novice, silver for Regular and gold for Veteran. You can unlock lower tiers if you select higher difficulty, but not the opposite way. Higher tiers are also more difficult to unlock.
Are you sure you want to exit the game? Tutorial progress will not be saved.
Are you sure you want to exit the game? Your game will be saved.
Rabbit A common wild rabbit, flees at high speed when approached Health: 5
Deer A common wild deer, stays alert to all creatures around it Health: 80
Albino Deer An extremely rare albino deer, its snow-white fur blends perfectly with the snow Health: 80
Wolf A dangerous creature of the wild, often moves in packs Health: 50
Bear The most dangerous creature in the wild, with a strong build and terrifying attack power Health: 500
Chicken Once a domestic animal, still found on farms today Health: 5 Favorite foods: Cranberries, Cloudberries, Raspberries, Elderberries, Earthworms
Pig Once a domestic animal, still found on farms today Health: 20 Favorite foods: Tomato, Apple, Banana, Zucchini, Bell Pepper, Orange, Cranberry, Cloudberry, Raspberry, Elderberry
Dog The most reliable companion, can provide many forms of help Health: N/A
Infected Ordinary people who didn't survive the outbreak, now trying to tear apart every living thing they see Health: 60 / 120 (Radiation Zone)
Crawler Moves faster and is more dangerous than regular infected Health: 80 / 160 (Radiation Zone)
Lurker Unlike other infected, it doesn't actively seek targets, instead hiding to deliver a lethal blow to careless passersby Health: 60 / 120 (Radiation Zone)
Infected Soldier An infected soldier, with a stronger body than regular infected Health: 100 / 200 (Radiation Zone)
Hazmat Infected A swollen infected, its protective suit filled with deadly corrosive fluid that spills out upon death Health: 80 / 160 (Radiation Zone)
NBC Infected Prolonged contact with chemicals caused mutation, granting faster movement and stronger lingering poison Health: 120 / 240 (Radiation Zone)
Screamer This weak infected can't harm you, but it will roar to attract nearby infected to swarm you Health: 50 / 100 (Radiation Zone)
Infected Police Officer The virus preserved its instinct to shoot, making it more dangerous than regular infected Health: 100 / 200 (Radiation Zone)
Infected Officer Was an officer before infection, giving it a stronger body and preserved shooting instinct Health: 120 / 240 (Radiation Zone)
Riot Infected This heavily armored individual from before is now one of the infected Health: 250 / 500 (Radiation Zone)
Leaper The virus greatly enhanced its leaping ability, allowing it to pounce on targets Health: 150 / 300 (Radiation Zone)
Spitter Its mouth contains large amounts of deadly liquid due to viral mutation, which it tries to spit at living things it sees Health: 100 / 200 (Radiation Zone)
Runner Once an excellent athlete, its former agility makes it try to dodge your ranged attacks Health: 100 / 200 (Radiation Zone)
Infected Drill Instructor The virus preserved its strength and agility, and it will try to dodge your ranged attacks Health: 120 / 240 (Radiation Zone)
Smoker This disgusting-looking infected has an extremely long tongue and will try to drag creatures towards it Health: 100 / 200 (Radiation Zone)
Armed Gorka Infected Well-equipped infected with preserved shooting instinct, will try to fire continuously at living things Health: 175 / 350 (Radiation Zone)
Heavily Armored Infected A well-equipped infected, the heavy armor worn in life now protects it well Health: N/A / 1000 (Radiation Zone)
Glowing One Prolonged radiation exposure caused a horrific mutation, making it more lethal and faster Health: N/A / 500 (Radiation Zone)
Infected Researcher A scientist trying to find a cure, injected with a failed vaccine after infection, undergoing a horrific mutation Health: N/A / 1000 (Radiation Zone)
Tank An extremely terrifying infected, the virus greatly enhanced its body and strength. Engaging it in melee is likely a foolish decision Health: 2000 / 4000 (Radiation Zone)
[From Winter Content Pack] Snowman This Howler has been dramatically wrapped in fairy lights by someone. Even zombies need to celebrate the holidays Health: 50 / 100 (Radiation Zone)
Survivor Neutral Survivor: Won't attack you, can trade with you Hostile Survivor: Attacks other survivors to loot supplies Friendly Survivor: Sticks with you, intends to survive together Health: 100
Black Bandit Dangerous individuals in the apocalypse, well-equipped, attempt to attack all other survivors Health: 110
Gorka Black Bandit A leader among black bandits, better equipped and more dangerous Health: 250
GP-5 Black Bandit Black bandit's faction exploration team sent into radiation zones, equipped with better weapons to deal with stronger infected Health: 150
Altyn Bandit The most dangerous Black bandit, with excellent armor and strong aggression Health: 500
Exit the game? Progress in this mode will not be saved
You can repair this boat with logs to go to the next island. Use an axe to chop down a tree and get logs.
There seem to be some supplies here. Get closer to pick them up.
You can check your items in the inventory.
This is your hotbar. It's usable even without equipment slots. Tap to select an item.
Welcome, survivor. You are stranded on a small island. Your only way to other islands is to find a boat or bridge on the east coast.
Tap or drag to move your character.
Use the virtual stick to move.
Choose your preferred movement method. You can change it anytime in settings.
As you kill enemies and play longer, you gain experience points. You can use XP to unlock new skills.
Select a skill to invest points and learn it. Each skill has two levels.
Press the interact button to pick up items or interact.
Now you have a ranged weapon. Equipping it automatically aims. Press the fire button to shoot.
When you have the appropriate ammo, press the reload button to reload.
Switch between melee and ranged weapons. Order: Melee -> Primary -> Secondary.
You are bleeding. Find a bandage or tear your T-shirt into rags to bandage.
Your health is empty. In the tutorial, you will be healed to full to continue.
You can drag items to organize your inventory.
That's a gun. Firearms can usually be found at military bases and gun stores.
There's an infected ahead. Your character will attack automatically when close.
That's a wolf. Often appears in packs, quite dangerous.
That's a water pump. You can drink directly from it or fill containers.
That's a wrecked car. You can search the trunk for supplies.
You can hunt deer and use a knife to get venison.
You can hunt rabbits and use a knife to get rabbit meat.
You can look around and pick berries from some bushes.
